programme.desc: One of the 7 Natural Wonders of the World, Victoria Falls is an amazing spectacle that straddles the Zambia/Zimbabwe border. programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep104: In Search of Perfect Waves

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep106: Shark Divers Part 1

Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Mike Glover, Green Beret and retired CIA operative, joins Don to kick it up a notch for our contestants. What would Surviving Mann be without some log PT? If it’s good enough for the Seals - it’s good enough for our contestants. If that wasn’t hard enough, Don and Mike have the contestants do some tire pulling, a run, tug of war, land nav and a Tyrolean traverse over alligator infested water. Oh, and did we mention the 40mph wind and rain storm?

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Aftermath hosts Chris and Cindy sit down with contestants Caleb and Jen to discuss one of the hardest days in Surviving Mann history. Caleb gives insight on his tug of war strategy.. which took inspiration from an unusual source. Next, Dr. Jeff West gives us the scoop about his life changing product. In the same vein, Eric from Nutrient Survival goes over what his company is doing for soldiers and civilians alike.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Still reeling from a mission briefing from the CIA, the contestants are thrown into a punishment for breaking protocol. It’s safe to say the contestants are having a sobering morning. However, the contestants are given a minor reprieve when Don assigns them to some stretch PT to give them a break before the ropes course gauntlet in the afternoon.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Chris and Cindy sit down with Matthew and James for a recap of Day 3, and let’s just say they’ll be staying away from crunches for the foreseeable future. Matthew also lets us in on his weakness that he’s hoping to work through in the upcoming days. From there, James goes into his background and the challenges he’s overcome to be able to rise up and test his limits.

programme.title: S1E1 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. Go behind the scenes to see the intense training sessions, precise bike tuning, and mental preparation that fuel his success. Experience the rush of high-stakes racing with heart-pounding runs, fierce rivalries, and moments that will keep you holding your breath. More than just the action, Beyond Limits reveals Jackson’s personal journey, the sacrifices he makes for his passion, and the powerful support network that drives him forward. This is the ultimate inside look at a world-class athlete chasing glory on two wheels.

programme.title: Inside Pro Surfing: Rip Curl Pro Bells Beach presented by Bonsoy 2025
programme.desc: Bells Beach on Victoria's South Coast is the longest-running surfing competition and will host the 62st edition this year. Bells is Australian surfing heritage. With the hope of scoring long-period, groomed walls, the surfers will need to display the perfect combination of power, precision, and timing. The biggest surfing legends have had the honor of winning and ringing ‘The Bell' and 2025 will see a hungry new generation vying for the opportunity to cement their names in one of surfing's most prestigious events.
